material_claims.claim: The campaign preserves 17 quarterly report PDFs from 2022 Q2 through 2026 Q2 plus one economics paper.
The 18 unique documents contain 294 pages and 390,574 extracted text characters.
The preserved measurements are independently accurate and methodologically continuous.
material_claims.reason: Preservation and text extraction do not independently verify measurements or reconcile methodology.
The mislabeled operator upload was explicitly excluded.

known_limitations: No longitudinal metric semantic layer has been promoted.
Repeated archive labels are not treated as distinct documents without distinct evidence.
